response: Yes, both Villa Paletti and Betrayal at House on the Hill are board games. Villa Paletti is a physical skill-based board game designed by Bill Payne and published by Zoch Verlag in 2001, while Betrayal at House on the Hill is a board game published by Avalon Hill in 2004, designed by Bruce Glassco and developed by several other designers. Both games are two-player abstract strategy board games.
